movie.synopsis: Sidhu, a simpleton studying in an engineering college, falls for Rajee, his wealthy junior. An incident in Rajee’s 10th class makes her draw clear-cut boundaries with boys, making Sidhu’s life difficult, and he struggles to communicate his love for her.
